creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 164492
qmmp-1.0.4, qmmp-qt4-0.9.5, qmmp-plugin-pack-1.0.2, and qmmp-plugin-pack-qt4-0.9.3

Every product has been updated.  The latest released
versions are:
qmmp-1.0.4, qmmp-plugin-pack-1.0.2,
qmmp-qt4-0.9.5, and qmmp-plugin-pack-qt4-0.9.3 .

All tests for these port are also done successfully by
portlint and poudriere(10.1preR on i386).  I will submit
poudriere logs of them again if they are needed.
